name: harness
description: Harness — agent-first development toolkit. The `harness-gemini` extension ships /harness:* slash commands, the harness MCP server, and a GEMINI.md context doc that covers personas and skills. Sibling plugins (`harness-claude`, `harness-cursor`, `harness-codex`) target the other major AI coding tools.

plugins.name: harness-gemini
plugins.description: Harness for Gemini CLI: every /harness:* slash command and the harness MCP server in one install. Persona behavior is documented in GEMINI.md (Gemini extensions don't have a native subagents field) and lifecycle hooks are out of scope (Gemini extensions don't support hooks).
